vocab.meaning: phương pháp toàn diện (kết hợp cả thân, tâm, trí)
vocab.example: I adopt a holistic approach to my well-being, ensuring that my mental health is as nurtured as my physical fitness.
My diet revolves around lean protein and complex carbohydrates to provide sustained energy throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: sự ổn định của các cơ cốt lõi
vocab.example: Pilates has been instrumental in enhancing my core stability, which significantly reduces the risk of back pain.

vocab.meaning: tuân thủ nghiêm ngặt một chế độ
vocab.example: It can be challenging during busy weeks, but I try my best to adhere to a strict exercise regime.

vocab.meaning: thực phẩm nguyên bản chưa qua chế biến
vocab.example: I’ve made a conscious effort to swap sugary snacks for unprocessed wholefoods like nuts and seeds.

vocab.meaning: sự linh hoạt và khả năng vận động
vocab.example: As I get older, I prioritize flexibility and mobility exercises to keep my joints supple.

vocab.meaning: khả năng phục hồi/kiên cường về tâm lý
vocab.example: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle is as much about psychological resilience as it is about physical strength.
I prefer foods with a low-glycemic index to avoid the sudden energy crashes associated with sugary treats.

vocab.meaning: buổi tập luyện cường độ cao/mạnh mẽ
vocab.example: Nothing beats the feeling of endorphins rushing through your body after a vigorous workout at the gym.
I view regular exercise as a crucial preventative measure against chronic lifestyle diseases.
